mapper.sql: cm.message_id AS messageId, cm.trip_id AS tripId, cm.sender_user_id AS senderUserId, au.nickname AS senderNickname, cm.message_type AS messageType, cm.content AS content, cm.created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CHAT_MESSAGE ( trip_id, sender_user_id, message_type, content ) VALUES ( #{message.tripId}, #{message.senderUserId}, #{message.messageType}, #{message.content} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM CHAT_MESSAGE cm JOIN APP_USER au ON cm.sender_user_id = au.user_id WHERE cm.message_id = #{messageId}
